title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: A YouTube video reviews Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash model across eight real-world workflows including multimodal vision, video understanding, contract analysis, code generation, voice transcription, error fixing, OCR parsing, and Workspace automation. The reviewer claims it offers Pro-tier performance at Flash-tier pricing.
